mainEntity.name: When can I place an order?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can place orders any day of the week.
Each order requires 2 to 3 days for our slow-fermentation process.
Delivery costs between $10 and $20 via Grab Express. East Island is preferred.

mainEntity.name: How do I order from Wheat Bunny?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can order via WhatsApp at +65 8515 7245 (fastest response) or DM us on Instagram @thewheatbunny.
